reviews.review_description: When are you finally going to update?

This app is amazing! I use it with Ableton to play my midi instruments in VR. Think air drumming but you are actually triggering your drum sounds and getting feedback from the controller vibrations. Same goes for playing synths. It is customizable, giving you a ton of options. 

Getting it up and running does take a few steps and you need some knowledge about how to use MIDI instruments in your DAW. But Tim the creator is helpful and gives in depth instructions. Once the initial setup is done, it’s pretty easy to jump and start jamming. 

I’m super excited about this app and the new possibilities it is creating!

developer_response.body:
Yo thank you so much for the great review! We're always impressed by your videos and thankful for your input in our community. 😊
We've got some exciting stuff in development so stay tuned!
